summary: Iteration 26 - Final Testing Before Deployment. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Login (owner/admin), Settings page with packaging_cost and manufactured_product fields, POS with takeaway/delivery modes, Super Admin Dashboard access.
passed_tests: GET /api/products - Returns products list with packaging_cost field
PUT /api/products/{id} - Update product with packaging_cost works correctly
GET /api/reports/sales - Returns sales report with all required fields
GET /api/system/branding - Super admin can access branding settings
GET /api/super-admin/tenants - Super admin can get tenants list

packaging_cost_field.notes: Field is present and editable. Value is saved correctly via API.

manufactured_product_link.notes: Dropdown field is present with 'بدون ربط' (No link) option and manufactured products list.

packaging_cost_calculation.notes: Packaging cost is calculated only for takeaway and delivery orders. Cost is added per item quantity.

super_admin_dashboard.notes: Separate login with email, password, and secret key (271018). Shows tenants list, statistics, subscription types.

super_admin_button.notes: Button visible only for super_admin role. Navigates to /super-admin page.

login.notes: Beautiful login page with restaurant background slideshow. Both owner and admin logins work correctly.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows quick action buttons, statistics with period filters, recent orders. Super Admin button visible for owner.

settings.notes: Settings page shows all tabs including Products. Edit product dialog shows packaging_cost and manufactured_product fields.

pos.notes: POS page shows order type tabs (محلي, سفري, توصيل), products with categories, tables grid, cart with payment options.

super_admin.notes: Super Admin Dashboard accessible at /super-admin. Shows tenants list, statistics, subscription management.

critical_code_review_comments: All new features (packaging_cost, manufactured_product_id) properly implemented in both backend and frontend
Packaging cost calculation correctly applies only to takeaway/delivery orders (server.py lines 4092-4125)
Super admin role check (hasRole) working correctly for dashboard button visibility
API endpoints properly secured with authentication and role-based access control
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_26.py - Created comprehensive test suite for iteration 26

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load without errors, all features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 completed successfully. All new features verified: 1) packaging_cost field in product edit dialog, 2) manufactured_product_id linking field, 3) packaging cost calculation for takeaway/delivery orders, 4) Super Admin Dashboard access with separate authentication. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, Settings, POS, Super Admin) working correctly. No issues found. Ready for deployment.
